description: Post-Series-B enterprise SaaS at $1.8M MRR. Full outbound + field sales, long cycles, high ACV.

mocked_enrichment.company_context: Enterprise workflow platform for Fortune-500 operations. Six-figure ACVs, 9-month sales cycle, dedicated CSM per account. Recent Series B. 120 employees, quota-carrying AEs with SDRs and SEs.
